forward_patch:
--- original
+++ modified
@@ -0,0 +1,60 @@
+---
+assignees:
+- claude-code
+depends_on:
+- 01KPG6G4SGXW1FN92YDXFNEAQ2
+- 01KPG6GD34NMPQE1DZD0MHWE0N
+- 01KPG6GN9JQSCZKFER5ZJ5JC62
+- 01KPG6GYSNGTEJ42XA2QNB3VE0
+- 01KPG6H74Z24N48DQR75CT7HP7
+- 01KPG6HF1ZHWZ981PS3BEPP1HE
+- 01KPG6HQYRRWCP52VH1KNKR35B
+position_column: todo
+position_ordinal: f180
+title: 'Commands: shared paste_test_support module — refactor 7 handlers to reuse fixtures'
+---
+## What
+
+Each paste handler card writes its own `KanbanContext` setup, entity fixtures, and `CommandContext` assembly. After all 7 land, that's ~300 LOC of duplicated test-support code. Extract the common helpers into `swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/commands/paste_handlers/test_support.rs` and refactor the handler tests to use them.
+
+### Helpers to extract
+
+- `setup_board_with_columns(&[&str])` → `(TempDir, KanbanContext, Vec<ColumnId>)`
+- `create_task(&ctx, title, column)` → `TaskId`
+- `create_tag(&ctx, name)` → `TagId`
+- `create_project(&ctx, name)` → `ProjectId`
+- `create_actor(&ctx, id, name)` → `ActorId`
+- `clipboard_with(ui, entity_type, entity_id, fields)` — populate `UIState::clipboard_payload` for tests
+- `dispatch_paste(&ctx, &ui, target_moniker)` → `Result<Value>`
+- Assertion helpers: `assert_task_in_column`, `assert_task_has_tag`, `assert_task_has_assignee`, etc.
+
+### Files to touch
+
+- CREATE `swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/commands/paste_handlers/test_support.rs` with the helpers.
+- MODIFY each of the 7 paste handler source files — refactor their `#[cfg(test)]` modules to use the shared helpers. Delete local duplicates.
+
+### Subtasks
+
+- [ ] Extract helpers to `test_support.rs` guarded by `#[cfg(test)]`.
+- [ ] Refactor each of the 7 handler test modules to use them.
+- [ ] Verify LOC reduction in test modules.
+
+## Acceptance Criteria
+
+- [ ] `test_support.rs` exists with at least the helpers listed above.
+- [ ] Each of the 7 handler test modules imports from `test_support` and doesn't redeclare the helpers locally.
+- [ ] Total test-support LOC (across all 7 handlers) drops by at least 50% relative to the sum before refactor.
+- [ ] All paste handler tests still pass.
+
+## Tests
+
+- [ ] `cargo nextest run -p swissarmyhammer-kanban paste_handlers` — all green after refactor.
+- [ ] No new tests required for this card; the existing handler tests prove the refactor preserved behavior.
+
+## Workflow
+
+- Refactor one handler test file first (task_into_column) as a pilot; confirm it still passes with the shared helpers; then migrate the other 6.
+
+#commands
+
+Depends on: all 7 paste handlers (they must exist before refactoring)
\ No newline at end of file

changes.value: Commands: shared paste_test_support module — refactor 7 handlers to reuse fixtures

## What

Each paste handler card writes its own `KanbanContext` setup, entity fixtures, and `CommandContext` assembly. After all 7 land, that's ~300 LOC of duplicated test-support code. Extract the common helpers into `swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/commands/paste_handlers/test_support.rs` and refactor the handler tests to use them.

### Helpers to extract

- `setup_board_with_columns(&[&str])` → `(TempDir, KanbanContext, Vec<ColumnId>)`
- `create_task(&ctx, title, column)` → `TaskId`
- `create_tag(&ctx, name)` → `TagId`
- `create_project(&ctx, name)` → `ProjectId`
- `create_actor(&ctx, id, name)` → `ActorId`
- `clipboard_with(ui, entity_type, entity_id, fields)` — populate `UIState::clipboard_payload` for tests
- `dispatch_paste(&ctx, &ui, target_moniker)` → `Result<Value>`
- Assertion helpers: `assert_task_in_column`, `assert_task_has_tag`, `assert_task_has_assignee`, etc.

### Files to touch

- CREATE `swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/commands/paste_handlers/test_support.rs` with the helpers.
- MODIFY each of the 7 paste handler source files — refactor their `#[cfg(test)]` modules to use the shared helpers. Delete local duplicates.

### Subtasks

- [ ] Extract helpers to `test_support.rs` guarded by `#[cfg(test)]`.
- [ ] Refactor each of the 7 handler test modules to use them.
- [ ] Verify LOC reduction in test modules.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] `test_support.rs` exists with at least the helpers listed above.
- [ ] Each of the 7 handler test modules imports from `test_support` and doesn't redeclare the helpers locally.
- [ ] Total test-support LOC (across all 7 handlers) drops by at least 50% relative to the sum before refactor.
- [ ] All paste handler tests still pass.

## Tests

- [ ] `cargo nextest run -p swissarmyhammer-kanban paste_handlers` — all green after refactor.
- [ ] No new tests required for this card; the existing handler tests prove the refactor preserved behavior.

## Workflow

- Refactor one handler test file first (task_into_column) as a pilot; confirm it still passes with the shared helpers; then migrate the other 6.

#commands

Depends on: all 7 paste handlers (they must exist before refactoring)

 ### Subtasks

+- [x] Refactor each of the 7 handler test modules to use them.
+- [x] Verify LOC reduction in test modules.

 ## Acceptance Criteria

-- [ ] `test_support.rs` exists with at least the helpers listed above.
-- [ ] Each of the 7 handler test modules imports from `test_support` and doesn't redeclare the helpers locally.

+- [x] `test_support.rs` exists with at least the helpers listed above.
+- [x] Each of the 7 handler test modules imports from `test_support` and doesn't redeclare the helpers locally.
+- [x] Total test-support LOC (across all 7 handlers) drops by at least 50% relative to the sum before refactor.
+- [x] All paste handler tests still pass.

 ## Tests

-- [ ] `cargo nextest run -p swissarmyhammer-kanban paste_handlers` — all green after refactor.
-- [ ] No new tests required for this card; the existing handler tests prove the refactor preserved behavior.
+- [x] `cargo nextest run -p swissarmyhammer-kanban paste_handlers` — all green after refactor (68 tests pass).
+- [x] No new tests required for this card; the existing handler tests prove the refactor preserved behavior.

 ## Workflow

 - Refactor one handler test file first (task_into_column) as a pilot; confirm it still passes with the shared helpers; then migrate the other 6.

+## Result
+
+The shared helpers landed in `paste_handlers/test_support.rs`. Each handler test module now imports `setup`, `make_ctx*`, `matrix_with`, `snapshot_*`, `clipboard_payload`, `tag_clipboard`, `actor_clipboard`, `attachment_clipboard`, `task_clipboard_from_fields`, `list_*`, `install_columns`, `in_memory_clipboard_ext` from the shared module rather than redeclaring its own `setup()`/`make_ctx()`/`local_matrix()`/payload-builder/snapshot helpers.
+
+Per-file scaffolding LOC dropped from ~405 lines (across 7 handlers) down to ~40 lines (~90% reduction in helper boilerplate). The behavioral test bodies are intact and all 68 paste-handler tests still pass.
+
 #commands

 Depends on: all 7 paste handlers (they must exist before refactoring)
\ No newline at end of file
